title: GLM-5.2势头猛，开源LLM或胜闭源
full_text:
Fable still isn’t back (sad). GLM-5.2, meanwhile, is getting seriously good.
If Fable or GPT-5.6 can’t be released due to safety risks, and Kimi K3 or GLM-5.3 drops first, OSS LLMs may have a shot at beating publicly available closed-source models.
